title: podman machine notify users it is pulling image
body:
### Feature request description

When issuing `podman machine init` (default logging) I don't see something for 3s. I have the feeling that something is not working and may abort my command.


current output:

https://github.com/containers/podman/assets/436777/4e5be711-ea50-44e3-977f-00ed1fe8cb36



### Suggest potential solution

Maybe display a progress line before `Getting image source signatures``

I've enabled logging trace and I'm wondering if it could not go faster on a first run


### Have you considered any alternatives?

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

comments.body:
Printing something before pulling the image sounds legit.  It's taking some time to find the right image to download.

```
DEBU[0001] Content-Type from manifest GET is "application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json" 
DEBU[0001] found image in digest: "sha256:a6ef33e9800a025b0e1485497fdeea5017f95584c9c855527d984fffb144767f" 
DEBU[0001] GET https://quay.io/v2/baude/stage-podman-machine-image/manifests/sha256:a6ef33e9800a025b0e1485497fdeea5017f95584c9c855527d984fffb144767f
DEBU[0001] Content-Type from manifest GET is "application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json" 
DEBU[0001] original artifact file name: podman-machine-daily.x86_64.qemu.qcow2.zst 
DEBU[0001] GET https://quay.io/v2/baude/stage-podman-machine-image/manifests/sha256:a6ef33e9800a025b0e1485497fdeea5017f95584c9c855527d984fffb144767f
DEBU[0001] Content-Type from manifest GET is "application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json" 
DEBU[0001] original artifact file name: podman-machine-daily.x86_64.qemu.qcow2.zst 
```

Looking at the logs above, I am under the impression we're fetching the same manifest twice.

Adding the message above leads to the following which feels more interactive:

[Screencast from 2024-03-01 14-13-02.webm](https://github.com/containers/podman/assets/11679875/f982686e-36a1-43b8-b121-1bd6321733dd)
